# llama.cpp

This directory is reserved for a vendored `llama.cpp` import.

No local `llama.cpp` checkout existed in this workspace at the time the
monorepo scaffold was created, so the backend slot is present but the source
has not been copied yet.

When imported, keep:

- the upstream project name `llama.cpp`
- Wfloat-owned integration code outside this directory where practical
- any local patching documented in repo docs or commit history
